extra.reason: Implemented in this change: PDF crash artifact capture, explicit VS Code test-host/download controls, native addon guardrail, actionlint cleanup, full lint stabilization, npm audit fixes, and VSIX packaging smoke verification.

Implemented in this change: PDF crash artifact capture, explicit VS Code test-host/download controls, native addon guardrail, actionlint cleanup, full lint stabilization, npm audit fixes, and VSIX packaging smoke verification.
Confirmed macOS local test runner uses background open path by default and documents LATEXWORKSHOP_FOREGROUND_TESTS=1 for debugging.
Added forward SyncTeX coverage for secure internal viewer delivery; fake synctex output is parsed and delivered to viewer.locate. Targeted unit and full test:ci passed.
Kept Math Preview commands/settings as compatibility no-ops, clarified package setting descriptions, and added command no-op coverage.
Stabilized test cleanup by covering additional TeX build artifacts (.run.xml, .xdv, .synctex) in suite reset; full macOS test:ci passed.
Verified npm run test:ci from a sandbox-disabled macOS run with LATEXWORKSHOP_VSCODE_TEST_PATH set; environment sanitization path launched and passed.
Verified isolated viewer suite with LATEXWORKSHOP_SUITE=05_viewer under the macOS local test host; run passed without self-host abort.
Confirmed @vscode/vsce is 3.9.1, yauzl is 3.2.1, and npm audit reports 0 vulnerabilities.
